name: buildpad
description: A collection of copy-and-own components for building DaaS-compatible Nextjs frontends

utils.name: utils
utils.description: Utility functions (cn, formatFileSize, field interface mapper, etc.)

types.name: types
types.description: Core TypeScript types for collections, fields, files, and relations

services.name: services
services.description: Service classes for fields, collections, items, permissions, and DaaS API config

hooks.name: hooks
hooks.description: React hooks for managing relational data, selection, presets, and workflows

api-routes.name: api-routes
api-routes.description: Server-side Supabase auth routes (login, logout, callback, user) + DaaS API proxy routes for Next.js (fields, items, relations, files) + DaaSProviderWrapper client component + authenticated route-group layout

content-routes.name: content-routes
content-routes.description: Content module pages with navigation sidebar, collection list, and item edit views

files-routes.name: files-routes
files-routes.description: Files management module pages — /files (drag-and-drop upload, folders, grid/list, search, bulk delete, import-from-URL) and /files/[id] (metadata edit + preview). Installs under the (authenticated) route group so the pages inherit DaaSProviderWrapper and the AuthenticatedShell. Requires the file-manager component.

users-routes.name: users-routes
users-routes.description: Users/roles/policies admin module pages — /users, /users/[id], /roles, /roles/[id], /policies, /policies/[id] (list + create/edit for each access-control domain). Installs under the (authenticated) route group so the pages inherit DaaSProviderWrapper and the AuthenticatedShell. Requires the users-management component.

forms-routes.name: forms-routes
forms-routes.description: Dynamic form builder module pages — /forms (list of form definitions), /forms/new (create a definition), /forms/[id] (visual FormBuilder editor), and /forms/[id]/fill (render the definition with DynamicForm to create a real item). Installs under the (authenticated) route group so the pages inherit DaaSProviderWrapper and the AuthenticatedShell. Requires the form-builder component.

supabase-auth.name: supabase-auth
supabase-auth.description: Supabase authentication clients and middleware for Next.js

external-oauth.name: external-oauth
external-oauth.description: External OAuth2/OIDC integration where Next.js acts as the OAuth client. Supports Azure AD, Google, Okta, Auth0, and generic OIDC providers. Includes PKCE, AES-256-GCM state encryption, JIT user provisioning, and multi-source claim extraction.

scope-routes.name: scope-routes
scope-routes.description: DaaS multi-tenant scope system — ScopeProvider context, ScopeSwitcher, error handling, and onboarding page. Calls DaaS directly; no proxy routes needed.

design-system.name: design-system
design-system.description: Design tokens, global styles, Mantine theme, and the app shell (ColorSchemeToggle, AuthenticatedShell). Scaffolded by init and refreshable via `upgrade --design`.

components.name: input
components.title: Input
components.description: Text input with validation, numeric support, and slug conversion

components.name: textarea
components.title: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with character count

components.name: input-code
components.title: InputCode
components.description: Code editor with syntax highlighting and line numbers

components.name: input-hash
components.title: InputHash
components.description: Hashed input interface for securely storing values like passwords. Shows lock icon indicator for existing hashed values.

components.name: system-token
components.title: SystemToken
components.description: Token generator interface with generate, copy, and remove actions. Used for API tokens and system authentication keys.

components.name: system-permissions
components.title: SystemPermissions
components.description: Permissions management interface with collection-based CRUD permission toggles. Used for policy permission editing with full/custom/none access levels, plus a tabbed detail editor for custom per-permission rules (item filters, field access, validation, presets).

components.name: input-block-editor
components.title: InputBlockEditor
components.description: Block-based content editor using EditorJS (SSR-safe wrapper)

components.name: tags
components.title: Tags
components.description: Tag input with presets and custom tags

components.name: select-dropdown
components.title: SelectDropdown
components.description: Dropdown select with search and custom option support

components.name: select-radio
components.title: SelectRadio
components.description: Radio button group with customizable layout

components.name: select-multiple-checkbox
components.title: SelectMultipleCheckbox
components.description: Checkbox group with 'other' option support

components.name: select-multiple-checkbox-tree
components.title: SelectMultipleCheckboxTree
components.description: Tree-based multi-select checkbox with hierarchical choices

components.name: select-multiple-dropdown
components.title: SelectMultipleDropdown
components.description: Dropdown-based multi-select with search support

components.name: select-icon
components.title: SelectIcon
components.description: Icon picker with categorized Tabler icons, plus the read-only IconDisplay companion that renders stored Material icon names from the same map

components.name: autocomplete-api
components.title: AutocompleteAPI
components.description: External API-backed autocomplete input

components.name: collection-item-dropdown
components.title: CollectionItemDropdown
components.description: Collection item selector dropdown

components.name: datetime
components.title: DateTime
components.description: Date, time, and datetime picker

components.name: boolean
components.title: Boolean
components.description: Checkbox toggle for boolean fields

components.name: toggle
components.title: Toggle
components.description: Enhanced switch toggle with icons and state labels

components.name: file
components.title: FileInterface
components.description: Single file upload with preview

components.name: file-image
components.title: FileImage
components.description: Image file picker with preview and focal point

components.name: files
components.title: Files
components.description: Multiple file upload interface with drag & drop

components.name: upload
components.title: Upload
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload zone

components.name: color
components.title: Color
components.description: Color picker with RGB/HSL support, presets, and opacity

components.name: list-m2m
components.title: ListM2M
components.description: Many-to-Many relationship interface with inline editing

components.name: select-dropdown-m2o
components.title: SelectDropdownM2O
components.description: Many-to-One dropdown selector with search and modal

components.name: list-o2m
components.title: ListO2M
components.description: One-to-Many relationship interface with changeset staging, permission gates, batch edit, drag-and-drop reorder, unique FK / singleton guards, nested template rendering, and dynamic filter interpolation

components.name: list-m2a
components.title: ListM2A
components.description: Many-to-Any polymorphic relationship interface

components.name: divider
components.title: Divider
components.description: Horizontal/vertical divider with title support

components.name: notice
components.title: Notice
components.description: Alert/notice component (info, success, warning, danger)

components.name: group-detail
components.title: GroupDetail
components.description: Collapsible form section with header

components.name: group-accordion
components.title: GroupAccordion
components.description: Accordion-style group with expandable sections

components.name: group-raw
components.title: GroupRaw
components.description: Transparent group wrapper that renders children inline

components.name: slider
components.title: Slider
components.description: Range slider with numeric type support

components.name: rich-text-html
components.title: RichTextHTML
components.description: WYSIWYG HTML editor powered by TipTap

components.name: rich-text-markdown
components.title: RichTextMarkdown
components.description: Markdown editor with live preview

components.name: vform
components.title: VForm
components.description: Dynamic form component that renders all 40+ interface types based on field schema (DaaS v-form equivalent)

components.name: collection-form
components.title: CollectionForm
components.description: CRUD form wrapper with data fetching - uses VForm for rendering all interface types

components.name: vtable
components.title: VTable
components.description: Presentation table with CSS Grid layout, column sorting, resizing, reordering (dnd-kit), row selection, manual row drag-and-drop, header context menus, and loading/empty states

components.name: collection-list
components.title: CollectionList
components.description: Data-connected collection table with pagination, search, sorting, column resize/reorder, header context menus, field add/remove, filtering, and bulk delete

components.name: filter-panel
components.title: FilterPanel
components.description: Field-type-aware filter builder producing DaaS-compatible JSON with AND/OR logic, nested groups, and panel/inline/collapsible display modes

components.name: content-navigation
components.title: ContentNavigation
components.description: Hierarchical sidebar navigation for the content module with collection tree, search, bookmarks, and group expand/collapse

components.name: content-layout
components.title: ContentLayout
components.description: Content module shell layout with responsive sidebar, header bar (breadcrumbs, title, actions), and main content area

components.name: save-options
components.title: SaveOptions
components.description: Dropdown menu for additional save actions (save & stay, save & add new, save as copy, discard)

components.name: map
components.title: Map
components.description: Placeholder map component for geometry input (no map library)

components.name: map-with-real-map
components.title: MapWithRealMap
components.description: Full-featured map with MapLibre GL JS and drawing tools

components.name: workflow-button
components.title: WorkflowButton
components.description: Workflow state button with transitions and revision comparison

components.name: file-manager
components.title: FileManager
components.description: Full files-management UI — list surface (drag-and-drop upload, import-from-URL, folders, grid/list views, search, bulk delete) and a file detail view (metadata edit + preview for image/video/audio/pdf). Composes the upload interface and the useFiles/useFolders hooks.

components.name: users-management
components.title: UsersManagement
components.description: Users, roles, and policies administration (RBAC management) — user list/detail with role assignment (M2M) and direct policy attachment, role list/detail with member management, hierarchy, and scope-assignment rules, policy list/detail with access flags and a per-collection permissions matrix (via system-permissions). Composes the useUsers/useRoles/usePolicies hooks.

components.name: form-builder
components.title: FormBuilder
components.description: Dynamic form builder — a design-time authoring layer (visual FormBuilder with drag-and-drop field palette, sections, per-field width/required/readonly/hidden controls, and a conditions editor reusing FilterPanel) plus a runtime renderer (DynamicForm, FormPreview) that merges a saved form definition onto the live collection schema and drives the existing CollectionForm/VForm runtime. Definitions are stored as items in an ordinary, consumer-owned collection (default fb_definitions); the schema is never mutated.

categories.name: rich-text
categories.title: Rich Text
categories.description: Rich text and content editing components

categories.name: admin
categories.title: Administration
categories.description: Users, roles, and policies administration components
